warnings: No canonical override log exists in this repo; override_count remains 'unknown' rather than being substituted by 0.
MET does not own override evidence. Once CDE/GOV declare an override-log artifact, this record will read from it.
Conversion suggestions are advisory; they do not adopt or activate any policy.
failure_prevented: Override count being silently reported as 0, masking the absence of any audit log; or fabricated override entries creating a false signal.
signal_improved: Override posture is explicit: count is 'unknown', reason is 'override_history_missing', and a paired POL-CDE-OVERRIDE-AUDIT signal proposes the missing log shape.
next_recommended_input: Forward POL-CDE-OVERRIDE-AUDIT to CDE/GOV for policy review; once an override log artifact exists, replace this record's overrides[] with reads from that source.
